I have 65 candies to share with 20 friends. If 10 friends cannot come to the party and the remaining friends eat the same amount of candy, how much candy does each person get?

A: There are 5 friends that can come to the party. If 10 friends cannot come and 5 friends can come, then the remaining friends are 5-10=-5. Therefore, 65 divided by -5 equals -13. Each person will get -13 candies.
